name: knowledge_sso_support
subject: SSO support
body: Professional edition supports SSO? How do I configure it?

name: technical_sso_failure
subject: SSO login keeps failing
body: I followed your SSO docs and configured SAML, but login keeps failing for our workspace. I expected team members to sign in, but instead we get an error page.

name: billing_question
subject: Why is my bill higher?
body: Why is this month's bill higher than last month? Please explain the charges on my invoice.

name: billing_plus_technical_conflict
subject: Upgrade error and duplicate charge
body: When I upgraded our plan the page failed and I was charged twice. Please explain the bill and fix the upgrade issue.

name: feedback_feature_request
subject: Report filters are frustrating
body: The new report page is hard to use and frustrating. Please add region filters.

name: unrelated_partnership
subject: SEO partnership
body: We provide overseas SEO services and would like to discuss a partnership with your team.

name: technical_missing_diagnostics
subject: API issue
body: Your API is broken and not working for us.
